title: spergularia rubra subsp. media
intro: Spergularia rubra subsp. media, also known as sandspurry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Spergularia rubra subsp. media include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and relieve digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its flowers, leaves, and stems can also be used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves.
